acmpca.permission.Actions.Docs: The private CA actions that can be performed by the designated AWS service. Supported actions are `IssueCertificate`, `GetCertificate`, and `ListPermissions`.

acmpca.permission.CertificateAuthorityAr.Docs: The Amazon Resource Number (ARN) of the private CA from which the permission was issued.

acmpca.permission.Principal.Docs: The AWS service or entity that holds the permission. At this time, the only valid principal is `acm.amazonaws.com`.

acmpca.permission.SourceAccount.Docs: The ID of the account that assigned the permission.
